code:
Let me rewrite cleanly. Top-level can't use `?`. Need to avoid it.

import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut stop = false

while i < n and not stop
  mut ws = true
  while ws
    if i >= n
      ws = false
    else
      let bw = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if bw == 32 or bw == 9 or bw == 13 or bw == 10
        i = i + 1
      else
        ws = false
      end
    end
  end
  if i >= n
    stop = true
  else
    mut neg = false
    let b0 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b0 == 45
      neg = true
      i = i + 1
    else if b0 == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        let c = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end
    let signed = if neg
      0 - val
    else
      val
    end
    if signed < 0
      stop = true
    else
      sum = sum + signed
    end
  end
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
